name: ISharingResult.T.
summary: Represents the result of a sharing operation, including the result code and associated data.

properties.name: Code
properties.summary: Gets the result code of the sharing operation.

properties.name: Data
properties.summary: Gets the data associated with the sharing operation.

properties.name: ErrorDetails
properties.summary: Gets the error details of the sharing operation.

properties.name: ErrorPath
properties.summary: Gets a path of the file or folder which is relevant to a specific error. SharingResultCode values documentation for a specific cases.

properties.name: Notifications
properties.summary: Gets the notifications related to the sharing operation.

properties.name: PathLengthLimit
properties.summary: Gets the maximum allowed length for the path which was exceeded.

properties.name: State
properties.summary: Gets the state Structures process and current model after the sharing operations completes.
